title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: A retrospective discussion by Google DeepMind scientists on the 10-year anniversary of AlphaGo's victory over Lee Sedol in March 2016. The video examines how the match catalyzed the modern AI revolution and enabled subsequent breakthroughs in algorithmic discovery and scientific challenges like protein folding.
